name: Choushimaru Co.,Ltd.
summary: Choushimaru Co.,Ltd. operates gourmet carousel sushi restaurants in Japan and internationally. As of August 15, 2019, it operated 94 stores. The company was formerly known as All Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Choushimaru Co.,Ltd. in April 2005. Choushimaru Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.
